useful_deltas.summary: Added a fixed-seed outcome-rank-free adapter that builds and selects free defined-risk DNA only on chronological train slices, then evaluates each exact selected DNA once on a strictly later untouched holdout with conjunctive absolute gates and no registry authority.
Hard gates now prefer unrounded PnL, drawdown, and max-loss values over rounded display fields, preventing precision-boundary false passes.
Capped free populations now persist eligible, evaluated, omitted, and zero-inclusive per-structure counts so sampled-population completeness cannot be mislabeled as balanced structure coverage.
The exact seed-1754 cap36 60% train cycle selected 17 train SHIPs and produced zero complete train-and-untouched-holdout passes and zero registration-eligible DNA under dual-cost absolute gates.

critic_findings.finding: The declared 11 eligible structures were mislabeled as if all were evaluated even though put_credit_spread had zero rows after the cap.
critic_findings.rationale: The regenerated artifact reports 11 eligible, 10 evaluated, put_credit_spread omitted, and zero-inclusive counts while keeping ranking completeness scoped to the sampled cap.

critic_findings.finding: Two run-stamped income-coverage snapshots existed for one run.
critic_findings.rationale: Accepted as residue cleanup but rejected as a machinery defect: the extra T2012 file was run-created debris and was removed; the existing deterministic --stamp generator reproduced only 2026-07-13T1754 plus LATEST, and those outputs are byte-identical.

critic_findings.finding: The nested fixed_cost object lacks an optional summary convenience field.
critic_findings.rationale: Exact zero- and one-cent by_half_spread rows, unrounded gate fields, and gate/quality summaries already provide every consumed metric. No evidence or decision relies on the absent duplicate convenience summary.

critic_findings.finding: The seed-1754 exact cycle needed a durable novelty key and closed-family record for future orientation.
critic_findings.rationale: Accepted as a required handoff update but rejected as a machinery defect: this compounding record now carries the unique novelty key and closed-family identifier, and the already-tested compounding machinery will inject them into the next orientation. The original orientation remains an immutable pre-run snapshot.

data_dependencies: Observed historical option replay remains independently blocked below the three-distinct-New-York-market-date plumbing boundary; that does not block labeled historical-underlying Black-Scholes proxy discovery.
Any future claim of balanced multi-structure coverage requires stratified sampling or evidence that every eligible structure received evaluated rows.
next: Implement and run one predeclared lagged gap-recovery 21-DTE put-credit-spread class on a fixed outcome-rank-free multi-symbol set: prior completed day opens at least 1% below its previous close, recovers to close at or above open, and closes above lagged EMA60; enter only on the following bar; use fixed DNA, controls, chronological 60/40 train-to-untouched-holdout, non-vacuous 5% and fixed-$0.01-per-leg costs, max_loss_usd<=300, window max DD<=75, dense-negative<=5, train AND holdout; register nothing first pass, keep L0/proxy, no paper/shadow/arm/live.
